title: Zack Polanski says he was wrong to call himself a Red Cross spokesperson
summary_full: Green party leader also accuses rightwing media of politically motivated attacks as popularity growsUK politics live – latest updatesZack Polanski has said he was wrong to describe himself as a British Red Cross spokesperson, and that intensified media scrutiny of the Green party reflected fears of its rising popularity and support for wealth taxes.Polanski described himself as a British Red Cross spokesperson while campaigning for the party leadership, the Times revealed. The claim was also mentioned on his personal website in 2020 when he said he was “really proud of the work we do”. Continue reading...
